# awesome-ai-index

> The definitive open-source AI ecosystem database.

This repository contains structured, machine-readable data about AI models, vendors, benchmarks, and compliance frameworks.

## Datasets

- data/models/models.json: 130+ AI models with benchmark scores, licensing, and risk classifications
- data/vendors/vendors.json: 40+ AI vendors with HQ, founding year, and focus areas
- data/benchmarks/benchmarks.json: 12+ benchmarks with methodology and saturation status
- data/compliance/frameworks.json: 7 regulatory frameworks with jurisdiction and effective dates

## Key Fields Per Model

- id, name, vendor, parameters_b, context_window, release_date
- benchmarks: mmlu, gpqa_diamond, humaneval, swe_bench_verified, math_500, chatbot_arena
- license_spdx, model_type (proprietary/open-weight), modality
- eu_ai_act_risk, ntia_compliant, known_cves

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/awesome-ai-index
- Website: https://alphaoneindex.com
- Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/datasets/alpha-one-index/awesome-ai-index
- License: CC-BY-SA-4.0

## Update Schedule

Models and vendors update weekly. Benchmarks update monthly. Compliance updates quarterly.
